title: Standard Auto Insurance Policy
summary: Comprehensive coverage for personal vehicles including liability, collision, and comprehensive protection.
coverage_details: Liability up to $300,000, Collision deductible $500, Comprehensive deductible $250, Rental car coverage $50/day up to 30 days
exclusions: Intentional damage, racing, wear and tear, commercial use
claim_process: Report within 24 hours via phone or web form. Provide police report for accidents over $1,000. Adjuster assigned within 48 hours.

title: Premium Home Insurance
summary: Comprehensive homeowners insurance covering dwelling, personal property, and liability.
coverage_details: Dwelling coverage up to $500,000, Personal property up to $250,000, Liability up to $1,000,000, Additional living expenses up to $100,000
exclusions: Flood damage, earthquake, normal wear and tear, pest infestations
claim_process: Document damage with photos. Submit claim online within 30 days. Inspector assigned within 72 hours.

title: Business Liability Insurance
summary: General liability protection for small to medium businesses against third-party claims.
coverage_details: General liability $2,000,000 per occurrence, Products liability $2,000,000, Medical payments $10,000, Defense costs outside limits
exclusions: Employee injuries (covered by workers comp), professional errors, intentional acts, pollution
claim_process: Notify within 30 days of incident. Provide all relevant documentation. Legal defense provided.

title: Health Insurance Basic Plan
summary: Essential health coverage with preventive care, emergency services, and prescription drugs.
coverage_details: Annual deductible $2,000, Coinsurance 80/20, Out-of-pocket max $6,000, Preventive care 100% covered, Emergency room $500 copay
exclusions: Cosmetic surgery, experimental treatments, dental/vision (separate plan)
claim_process: Use in-network providers. Pre-authorization required for specialist visits. Claims filed electronically.

title: Life Insurance Term Plan
summary: Affordable term life insurance with coverage from 10 to 30 years.
coverage_details: Coverage amounts from $100,000 to $5,000,000, Level premiums for term duration, Convertible to permanent policy, Accelerated death benefit included
exclusions: Suicide within first 2 years, fraud, hazardous activities
claim_process: Submit death certificate and claim form. Beneficiary paid within 30 days of approved claim.
